text:
- Add missing DEPENDS on p5-Clone
- Avoid use of SITE_PERL in DEPENDS
- Expand value of BUILD_DEPENDS before assigning to RUN_DEPENDS
- Sort DEPENDS
- Bump PORTREVISION

Port maintainer (hartzell@alerce.com) is cc'd.
